title: Fix desktop Facebook Page embed rendering and deterministic fallback on Home page

requirements.summary: Update the Home page Facebook presence block so the Barobo National High School Facebook Page timeline reliably renders on desktop/tablet while preserving mobile behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: On desktop/tablet viewport widths (>= 768px), the Facebook presence area displays the embedded timeline/posts (not just an empty container).
On mobile viewport widths (< 768px), the Facebook embed continues to work as it does today.
The Facebook presence block continues to target the exact page URL: https://www.facebook.com/BaroboNationalHighSchool.

file_operations.description: Replace the current XFBML-based embed with a more reliable desktop-friendly Facebook Page Plugin iframe approach that targets exactly https://www.facebook.com/BaroboNationalHighSchool, and make the embed responsive (derive plugin width from the rendered container) so it renders consistently on md+ viewports.

Add a small helper to build the Facebook Page Plugin iframe URL deterministically from inputs (pageUrl, tabs, width, height) while ensuring the pageUrl stays exactly https://www.facebook.com/BaroboNationalHighSchool when used by the Home page Facebook presence block.

requirements.summary: Make Facebook embed loading and failure detection deterministic so fallback only shows on genuine failure and never due to fragile DOM checks.
acceptanceCriteria: If the embed loads successfully, the fallback (Facebook icon/link) is not shown.
If the embed fails to load (simulate by blocking facebook.com or the plugin URL), the fallback is shown within a reasonable time (<= 10 seconds) and links open in a new tab.
No reliance on fragile DOM queries (e.g., querying for a nested iframe that may not exist until after parsing) causes false negatives in desktop view.

file_operations.description: Implement deterministic embed state handling using iframe events and a bounded timeout (<=10s): show a loading state initially, mark success on iframe load, mark failure on iframe error/timeout, and only render the fallback link when failure is confirmed; remove fragile document.querySelector-based checks.

Remove/avoid reliance on the Facebook SDK script injection/XFBML parsing for the Home page Facebook block so the embed's load/failure behavior is controlled entirely by the FacebookPresenceBlock implementation (prevent desktop false negatives triggered by SDK timing/parsing).

requirements.summary: Preserve the existing Home page two-column layout and height-matching behavior between Weather Forecast and the Facebook block on md+ without affecting other sections or global styling.
acceptanceCriteria: On md+ viewports, the Facebook embed area is constrained to the same overall height as the weather section (as currently intended via maxHeight).
On small screens, the Facebook block stacks below the weather section and is not artificially height-constrained.
No changes are introduced to unrelated sections (e.g., School Activities, DepEd section, footer/header) or to global Tailwind theme variables.

file_operations.description: Keep the existing maxHeight-driven height constraint behavior for md+ by applying the outer container height only when maxHeight is provided, and ensure the internal embed viewport accounts for header spacing while allowing natural sizing when maxHeight is undefined (mobile).

Preserve the current grid layout and weather-height measurement behavior; keep passing measured weatherHeight as maxHeight only on md+ viewports and avoid any layout/global styling changes outside the existing Weather + Facebook two-column section.
